subject: A translucent crystal sphere cradled in dark gauntleted hands, holding a miniature floating cityscape suspended inside it, with wisps of mist curling around the orb
description: A pair of dark, armored hands cradles a large translucent crystal globe from below. Inside the sphere, a tiny city — towers, spires, dense rooftops — hangs suspended as if preserved in glass, glowing faintly warm against the cool grays of the orb. Soft tendrils of mist or smoke wrap around the sphere's exterior. The background is a hazy, indeterminate dark space that throws the orb into sharp relief. The mood is contemplative and reverent, with a hint of melancholy — as if the city is something cherished, fragile, possibly lost.
foreground: armored hands holding a crystal sphere containing a miniature city
background: hazy dark void with drifting mist
